chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No.607 of 1994 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For Arguments 24.10.2024 None present for the Plaitniff Mr. Iqbal Khurram Advocate for KMC.-.-.-.-.-. 28 years old case and counsel for the plaintiff is not present even today to proceed with this matter. Case diary reflects that very little interest has been shown in these proceedings at least for the last Eight years and continuously adjournments have been sought by the Plaintiff counsels. It appears they lost interest in this matter. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Amjad PS
